headlines.title: Appeals court rejects Biden’s bid to block release of recordings of ghostwriter interviews
headlines.description: A federal appeals court has rejected a request by Joe Biden to block the release of audio recordings and transcripts of his interviews with a memoir ghostwriter before he was elected president.

headlines.title: Trump gives update on war with Iran during meeting with Lebanese president
headlines.description: During a meeting with the president of Lebanon, President Trump took questions from reporters on the ongoing war and negotiations with Iran after the deaths of U.S. servicemembers. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on what the president had to say about the conflict and his recent comments about U.S. elections.

headlines.title: Trump Targets Canada With 50% Tariff Citing Trade Discrimination
headlines.description: President Donald Trump has announced a new 50% tariff on most Canadian goods, accusing the country of discriminating against American-made products. Meantime, the White House says the new Air Force One, gifted by Qatar, will be sent away for upgrades, raising new questions about how safe it is for the president. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: US Carries out 10th Night of Strikes After Service Members Killed
headlines.description: United States Central Command released video of its 10th night of consecutive strikes flying deep into Iran, targeting command centers, launch sites and air defenses. President Donald Trump says Iran “will pay” anytime they kill an American servicemember. Meanwhile, the State Department issued a rare global travel warning to Americans abroad after Iran sent another barrage of missiles into Jordan. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
headlines.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

headlines.title: Sen. Darline Graham says she’s running for a full 6-year term after Trump urged her to jump into the race
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said he had given his “complete and total endorsement” to Graham, who was appointed to finish her late brother’s Senate term.

headlines.title: Democrats avoid a messy fight in Maine, but uncertainty lingers: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: Welcome to From the Politics Desk, a daily newsletter that brings you the NBC News Politics team’s latest reporting and analysis from the White House, Capitol Hill and the campaign trail.

headlines.title: Trump says new Air Force One will be sent away for upgrades amid security concerns
headlines.description: President Trump said the Air Force One plane that was donated by Qatar will be sent away for upgrades amid swirling concerns about its security features.

headlines.title: Top Maine Senate candidates end campaigns as Troy Jackson builds Democratic support
headlines.description: Former state Senate President Troy Jackson is racking up support to become Maine’s next Democratic Senate nominee, with one of his top opponents, Shenna Bellows, ending her campaign on Sunday.

headlines.title: Usha Vance gives birth to fourth child
headlines.description: Second lady Usha Vance gave birth Sunday to her fourth child, Vice President JD Vance announced on X. “We are excited to announce that our baby boy, Alec Neel Vance, was born this morning,” Vance said in a statement.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Rep. Ralph Norman launches campaign to replace Lindsey Graham in Senate race
headlines.description: Rep. Ralph Norman, R-S.C., announced Saturday that he plans to run in the special Senate primary election to fill the late GOP Sen. Lindsey Graham’s seat.
